query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_with_reg, MAX(registeredAt) as newest, MIN(registeredAt) as oldest, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE registeredAt IS NULL) as null_count FROM customers WHERE registeredAt IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_with_reg, MAX(registeredAt) as newest, MIN(registeredAt) as oldest, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE registeredAt IS NULL) as null_count FROM customers WHERE registeredAt IS NOT NULL;
